/usr/bin/c++ -g -arch arm64 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names -L/opt/homebrew/opt/qt@6/lib CMakeFiles/test_database_driver.dir/test_database_driver_autogen/mocs_compilation.cpp.o CMakeFiles/test_database_driver.dir/test_database_driver.cpp.o -o ../../bin/test_database_driver -F/opt/homebrew/opt/qt@6/lib  /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@6/lib/QtTest.framework/Versions/A/QtTest ../../lib/libtablepro_core.a -framework Security -framework AppKit -framework ApplicationServices -framework Foundation /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@6/lib/QtSql.framework/Versions/A/QtSql /opt/homebrew/opt/qt@6/lib/QtCore.framework/Versions/A/QtCore -framework IOKit -framework DiskArbitration -framework UniformTypeIdentifiers
